value: `Color.isLight` defaults to threshold 0.6 (not 0.5) and `Color.isDark` defaults to 0.3. They are deliberately asymmetric — the band 0.3..0.6 means a color may be neither light nor dark. `contrastingColor()` uses 0.5 by default, which is symmetric. The parameterized `isLight(threshold:)` / `isDark(threshold:)` were added in 1.5.0; the parameterless properties remain for source compatibility.
